MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $410.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE JAN-04-2011, FILED BY DEFENDANT EMCARE, INC., A CORPORATION CALIFORNIA EM-1 MEDICAL SERVICES, A MEDICAL CORPORATION BRAUN MD, RUSSELL
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT EMCARE, INC., A CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR SEP-14-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLEM, LINDA

DEFENDANT RUSSELL BRAUN, M.D.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST-3RD AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. ALLEGATIONS IN THE COMPLAINT INDICATE THAT PLAINTIFF ENTERED INTO AN EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT WITH EMCARE AND THAT EMCARE WAS HER EMPLOYER. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CITE TO ANY FACTS SHOWING HOW DR. BRAUN ALSO BECAME HER EMPLOYER. THE DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS MOOT. PLAINTIFF ADMITS THAT THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS ONLY AGAINST EMCARE. THE DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLEGE A BASIS FOR RESTITUTION OR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF AGAINST DR. BRAUN. MADRID V. PEROT SYSTEMS CORP. (2005) 130 CAL.APP.4TH 440, 452. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797 (302)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED ON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT EMCARE, INC., A CORPORATION CALIFORNIA EM-1 MEDICAL SERVICES, A MEDICAL CORPORATION BRAUN MD, RUSSELL

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT RUSSELL BRAUN, M.D.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT DR. BRAUN'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST-3RD AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. ALLEGATIONS IN THE COMPLAINT INDICATE THAT PLAINTIFF ENTERED INTO AN EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT WITH EMCARE AND THAT EMCARE WAS HER EMPLOYER. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CITE TO ANY FACTS SHOWING HOW DR. BRAUN ALSO BECAME HER EMPLOYER.
THE DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS MOOT. PLAINTIFF ADMITS THAT THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS ONLY AGAINST EMCARE.
THE DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLEGE A BASIS FOR RESTITUTION OR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF AGAINST DR. BRauN. MADRID V. PEROT SYSTEMS CORP. (2005) 130 CAL.APP.4TH 440, 452. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
